architecture.uml:
left to right direction node "Alarm Controller" node "Radio Demodulator" node "Audio Amplifier" node Speaker
"Alarm Controller" -- "Audio Amplifier" --
"Radio Demodulator" -- "Audio Amplifier" --
"Audio Amplifier" -- Speaker --
architecture.description: Physical audio path showing how alarm and radio audio drive the speaker.

interface.description: A wire carries alarm trigger output from the alarm controller to the audio path.
interface.electrical: The alarm wire SHALL enable the audio path when alarm conditions are met.

interface.description: A wire carries decoded audio signal from the radio demodulator to the audio amplifier.
interface.electrical: The analog audio wire SHALL carry demodulated audio from the receiver stage to the amplifier stage.

interface.description: A wire carries amplified audio from the audio amplifier to the speaker.
interface.mechanical: The speaker SHALL be mounted to radiate audible sound from the enclosure.
interface.electrical: The speaker wire SHALL carry amplified audio current from the amplifier to the speaker.
